title: vicia graminea var. lessonii
intro: Vicia graminea var. lessonii, also known as the Japanese vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. The medicinal properties of Japanese vetch include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. It has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. Japanese vetch can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
